rationale: Multiplayer has a deep task pool for this session.
Top cluster has 6 near-complete items, giving strong cleanup value.
Multiple backup clusters are available if the route stalls.
Plan has fewer stops than requested, likely due to limited task density.
Goal is bottleneck attack, so high-leverage gated work should be prioritised.

quick_description: Push harder bottlenecks. Less comfort, more tracker movement. Multiplayer-only route.

quick_profile.description: Push harder bottlenecks. Less comfort, more tracker movement. Multiplayer-only route.

series_context.episode_title: Brute Forcing Multiplayer Completion Before MW4
series_context.hook: AI forced a high-energy Multiplayer push to attack the BO7 completion backlog before MW4.
series_context.stakes: 104 day(s) to the MW4 October target.
series_context.route_promise: Commander selected 4 stop(s) in Multiplayer. First target: Scout Pulse - Overclock 2.
series_context.pace_line: Tracker state: 740 available next-step objectives, 27 locked, 21 app-logged completions.
series_context.intro_line: Today I am not choosing the grind. The Commander picked Multiplayer, and I have to follow it.
series_context.mid_session_line: No rerolls unless the objective is impossible. If it fails, the debrief blames the route.
series_context.outro_line: The AI chose the grind. The tracker decides if it was worth it.
proof_points: Show the assigned loadout and natural weapon goal.
First proof target: Scout Pulse - Overclock 2.
Capture unlock, progress bar, level gain, camo pop, or challenge tier proof.
End on Mission Control debrief so the route has a verdict.

morale.headline: ONE CHALLENGE. THEN THE NEXT.
morale.line: Do not negotiate with the backlog. The Commander already made the decision.
morale.rule: Minimum viable win: one tier, one camo tick, one level, or one honest partial.
morale.micro_action: Load in, play the first stop, and look only for proof on Scout Pulse - Overclock 2.
morale.fail_safe: If frustration spikes, log partial progress instead of deleting the session.
